home_description: Welcome to my technological world. I define myself as a determined mind working at the intersection of Web & Mobile Development, Web Design, and Data Analysis. Deeply fascinated by Artificial Intelligence, I don't just follow the trends; I strive to lead them. For me, every line of code is an opportunity for innovation, and every day is a new learning ground. Convinced that excellence is cultivated day after day, I dedicate every moment to enriching my skills and pushing my boundaries to bring future projects to life. Guided by an insatiable passion, I transform complex concepts into concrete, seamless, and secure solutions.
about_subtitle: Engineer by training in Software Engineering and AI - INES (Rwanda)
about_description: Engineer by training in Software Engineering at the National Institute of Higher Education (INES - Rwanda), I am passionate about web and mobile development and systems and data security. I leverage my strong background in Computer Engineering (with a specialization in software engineering) and my in-depth approach to the design and implementation of secure information systems. Possessing an analytical mind and methodological rigor, I can easily integrate into a team, listen attentively, and demonstrate a strong sense of responsibility. Furthermore, I have a deep interest in data analysis and artificial intelligence.
